summary: Tested Client Dashboard with all new features: Profile (photo, email, phone, LinkedIn, city), Contacts & Friends (list, requests, suggestions), Payment Cards (CRUD), Documents (CRUD), Messaging (conversations), Statistics (real stats), and Compte particulier (renamed). Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All sections working correctly.

issues: ESLint warnings for useEffect missing dependencies (fetchInitialData, fetchProfileData) - non-blocking

critical_code_review_comments: ClientDashboard.js has ESLint warnings for useEffect missing dependencies - consider adding eslint-disable comments or fixing
All client APIs properly implemented with MongoDB persistence
Friend system includes notifications for requests and acceptances
Messaging system uses MongoDB aggregation for conversations
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_client_dashboard.py - Created new test file for client dashboard APIs
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data. Test cards and documents created during tests are auto-cleaned.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client Dashboard fully tested. All features working: Profile with edit mode (photo upload, phone, LinkedIn, city), Contacts & Friends (list, requests, suggestions with Ajouter buttons), Payment Cards (VISA card displayed, add/delete working), Documents (existing document displayed, add/delete working), Messaging (conversations list, message display), Statistics (profile_views, friends_count, orders_count), Compte particulier (renamed from Compte entrepreneur). APIs tested: /api/client/profile (GET/PUT), /api/client/friends (GET), /api/client/friend-requests (GET), /api/client/friends/request (POST), /api/client/friends/{id}/respond (PUT), /api/client/suggested-friends (GET), /api/client/cards (GET/POST/DELETE), /api/client/documents (GET/POST/DELETE), /api/messages/conversations (GET), /api/messages (POST).

features_tested.profile_section: ✓ View/Edit mode, avatar upload, email (non-editable), phone, LinkedIn, city, stats row
features_tested.contacts_friends: ✓ Friends list (0), friend requests, suggestions (3 users), Ajouter buttons
features_tested.payment_cards: ✓ Existing VISA card displayed, add card modal, delete functionality
features_tested.documents: ✓ Existing document displayed, add document modal with file upload, delete functionality
features_tested.messaging: ✓ Conversations list, message display, send message
features_tested.statistics: ✓ Real stats from MongoDB (profile_views, friends_count, orders_count)
features_tested.compte_particulier: ✓ Renamed from 'Compte entrepreneur', shows create account prompt
